Marginal impact.\n- Gaming: Revenue grew 9% in FY2025 (MD&A, page 40) but turned negative in Q2 FY2026 (earnings call). AI diffusion may enhance game content creation and personalization, but the primary drivers remain content quality and platform reach. Xbox Cloud Gaming could benefit from AI infrastructure.
